seed_instruction: Design a birthday party plan for a 5-year-old, specifying games, snacks, and decorations.
org_constraint: The response must contain exactly 10 sentences, with each paragraph containing at least 3 sentences.
new_constraint: The response must contain four paragraphs.
instruction: Design a birthday party plan for a 5-year-old, specifying games, snacks, and decorations. The response must contain exactly 10 sentences, with each paragraph containing at least 3 sentences. The response must contain four paragraphs.
response:
Start by decorating the room with colorful balloons and a large, cheerful banner that says "Happy Birthday." You can create a fun obstacle course using pillows and tape on the floor for the little ones to run through. Adding a photo booth corner with funny props will give the child plenty of memorable moments to pose for.

For the entertainment, organize a "Red Light, Green Light" game where everyone must freeze when the music stops. Follow this with a silly dance party that encourages the kids to move freely and express their joy. You might also include a simple treasure hunt where they find small prizes hidden around the house.

Serve a variety of finger foods like fruit skewers, cheese cubes, and mini sandwiches so the children can eat while playing. A large platter of cupcakes with different colored frosting will be the centerpiece of the snack table. Ensure there is plenty of water available to keep everyone hydrated throughout the lively event.

End the celebration with a special cake cutting ceremony where the birthday child blows out the candles. Take a group photo of all the happy guests to capture the perfect memory of the day. Finally, thank the family and friends who helped make this wonderful birthday party a success.
